overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The character moves from a covered pedestrian walkway beneath the Ellison building into a bright open plaza dominated by towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements, then approaches a bustling street market with food vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance with crosswalk and signage

events.description: entering covered pedestrian walkway beneath the Ellison building

agents.ego_description: walking toward and entering the covered walkway entrance, following a pedestrian in white clothing

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and gray pants walking ahead into the covered entrance

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading 'Ellison' above the building entrance
tall traffic signal pole at the street corner
red and yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines
towering futuristic buildings with holographic advertisements visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a city crosswalk approaching the Ellison building entrance. The camera follows a pedestrian into a covered walkway, transitioning from bright sunlight to shadow. Other pedestrians are visible walking in various directions, and futuristic skyscrapers loom in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian colonnade with concrete pillars

events.description: approaching the exit of the covered walkway, with increasing natural light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered colonnade, passing between large concrete support pillars

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket walking in the opposite direction through the colonnade

entered.detail: overhead concrete ceiling with linear fluorescent light fixtures
massive rectangular concrete columns lining both sides of the walkway
long rectangular ceiling lights illuminating the covered passage

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian colonnade with massive concrete pillars and overhead lighting. The space is sheltered from direct weather, with glimpses of the futuristic city skyline visible through side openings. The character passes other pedestrians while moving toward the bright exit at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with construction barriers and towering skyscrapers

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into a bright open plaza with towering neon skyscrapers
slight turn toward the street vendor area on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk past orange and white construction barriers, with palm trees and towering glass buildings ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown leather jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the skyscrapers

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with prominent 'ORBITAL AIR' neon signage in green and red
orange and white striped plastic barriers lining the edge of the walkway
tall palm trees planted along the sidewalk edge
ground floor commercial spaces with signage including 'Wreck' shop

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a vast sunlit plaza dominated by the Orbital Air tower and other neon-lit skyscrapers. The character walks along a sidewalk bordered by construction barriers on the right and street-level shops on the left. Palm trees line the path, and the bright futuristic cityscape fills the view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street market with food vendors and neon signage

events.description: entering the street market area with food stalls and browsing pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking through the bustling street market, approaching food stalls and observing vendor displays

notable_agents.action: vendor in teal tank top standing behind the Combat Cab food stall counter
pedestrian in black dress browsing goods at the market stall

entered.detail: food vendor stall with prominent 'CONBATCAB' neon signage and menu displays
large red vertical banner with 'MEGAMI MARKET' text
wide concrete staircase with orange railings leading up to building entrance
neon sign reading 'WATSON WHORE' in pink letters above a stall

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a vibrant street market area with multiple food stalls and vendors. The character approaches the Combat Cab food stall with its bright neon signage, passing by the Megami Market banner and concrete stairs. Pedestrians browse the various stalls, and the futuristic city towers remain visible in the background while the camera focuses on the market activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a shaded urban corridor into a vast, sun-drenched futuristic plaza and finally into a bustling street market. It begins at a city crosswalk, following a pedestrian from the bright sunlight into the deep shadows of a covered walkway beneath the Ellison building. As the camera moves through the concrete colonnade, the view is framed by massive pillars and glimpses of the skyline before the scene opens up into a wide, light-filled plaza dominated by the Orbital Air tower and neon-lit skyscrapers. The path then leads along a sidewalk lined with palm trees and construction barriers, shifting from the open scale of the plaza toward the dense activity of a street market. Finally, the camera focuses on the vibrant energy of the market area, passing under the Megami Market banner to approach the neon signage of the Combat Cab food stall.
